summary: Matched Link's `ftLk_SpecialNEnd_Coll` by restructuring the surrounding helper `doEndColl`, consolidating `MUST_MATCH` unused-stack padding, adjusting boolean comparisons and assignments, preserving `fp->item_gobj` around arrow cleanup, and simplifying the ground/air collision branch condition.
what_changed: Replaced the prior asm placeholder for `ftLk_SpecialNEnd_Coll` with matching C in `src/melee/ft/chara/ftLink/ftLk_SpecialN.c`.
Moved the `MUST_MATCH` unused stack padding in `doEndColl` to the top of the helper and changed it from smaller nested pads to a single 12-byte local array.
Introduced an outer-scope `Item_GObj* item_gobj` temporary in `doEndColl` so `fp->item_gobj` can be saved before `ftLk_SpecialN_UnsetArrow(gobj)` and restored afterward.
Changed `fp->cmd_vars[cmd_unk1_bool] == 1` to `== true` and assignment from `0` to `false`, preserving the same intent while matching the desired codegen.
Flattened nested scopes around the thumb position calculations and arrow update call.
Changed `lpos.z = rpos.z = 0` to `rpos.z = lpos.z = 0`, likely to influence store ordering for matching.
Changed the collision branch from `ft_80082708(gobj) == GA_Ground` to `!ft_80082708(gobj)` before calling `ftCommon_8007D5D4` and changing to `ftLk_MS_SpecialAirNEnd`.
smart_moves: Used a single `MUST_MATCH` stack-padding declaration at the start of `doEndColl` instead of multiple nested unused arrays, which better controlled the function's stack layout.
Preserved `fp->item_gobj` across `ftLk_SpecialN_UnsetArrow`, indicating that the unset helper may clobber or clear item state that this action still needs restored.
Kept the behavioral logic small and local: the PR only touched the Link SpecialN source file and focused narrowly on matching `ftLk_SpecialNEnd_Coll`.
Adjusted expression spelling, such as boolean comparisons and chained `z` assignments, to guide compiler output without introducing broad semantic changes.
decomp_lessons: For matching small fighter collision callbacks, helper-function stack layout may matter as much as the top-level callback body.
When a helper call mutates fighter state, saving and restoring a field in a local temporary can be necessary both for behavior and for register/stack matching.
Equivalent boolean tests are not always codegen-equivalent; `!ft_80082708(gobj)` may match where `ft_80082708(gobj) == GA_Ground` does not.
Chained assignment order can affect generated stores; try both `a = b = 0` and `b = a = 0` forms when matching Vec3 field zeroing.
Flattening unnecessary nested scopes can alter local lifetimes and stack allocation enough to resolve nonmatching code.
naming_conventions: `SpecialNEnd` names the neutral special end action state.
`_Coll` suffix identifies the collision callback for an action state.
`doEndColl` is a local static inline helper used to share or structure collision-end logic.
`ftLk_GObj`, `ftLk_Fighter`, and `ftLk_DatAttrs` are typed Link-specific aliases or structs used around `GET_FIGHTER(gobj)`.
`cmd_unk1_bool` is treated as a boolean command variable even though the name remains unknown.
`fv.lk.arrow_gobj` and `mv.lk.specialn` are Link-specific fighter variable and motion-variable paths.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used `#ifdef MUST_MATCH` with an unused local `u8 _[12] = { 0 };` to force stack shape.
Moved local declarations, including `Item_GObj* item_gobj`, to alter lifetime/register allocation.
Flattened inner blocks that previously contained separate `MUST_MATCH` stack pads.
Reordered `Vec3` z-field zeroing from `lpos.z = rpos.z = 0` to `rpos.z = lpos.z = 0`.
Expressed the ground check as logical negation of `ft_80082708(gobj)` instead of equality with `GA_Ground`.
Used `true` and `false` for `cmd_vars[cmd_unk1_bool]` comparisons and assignments rather than integer literals.
follow_up_queries: Look for other Link SpecialN callbacks that preserve `fp->item_gobj` around `ftLk_SpecialN_UnsetArrow`.
Search for `MUST_MATCH` unused stack padding in fighter collision callbacks to compare stack-layout tactics.
Check whether other callbacks use `!ft_80082708(gobj)` instead of `== GA_Ground` for matching.
Search for `rpos.z = lpos.z = 0` or reversed chained Vec3 zeroing patterns in matched fighter code.
